plugins.name: Jyotish Suite
plugins.description: A six-system Vedic astrology toolkit for Claude Code — classical Vedic, BNN (Brighu Nadi), Jaimini, Lal Kitab, and KP natal + horary — each a methodology-locked skill with its own slash command.
plugins.longDescription: One plugin bundling six rigorous Jyotish systems. Every skill is a wave orchestrator: charts are computed from birth data (or parsed from a pasted chart) and verified with you; a deterministic Python baseline computes all arithmetic and table lookups (nakshatras, dashas, degree flags, dignities, significators, aspect maps, Karakas, rin/teva triggers, timing signals); parallel subagents interpret the facts; and a synthesizer weaves the final reading. Because the model interprets facts it never has to calculate, the numbers are exact and reproducible — guarded by a golden-chart regression harness.

commands.description: Multi-layered natal chart reading: Nakshatras, Padas, degrees, aspects, Vimshottari Dasha, and composite synthesis
commands.hint: [optional notes — focus area, life domain, time horizon]

commands.description: Natural Karaka analysis through sign fields, flow/trine/growth positions, degree-based timing, and Dasha activation
Chara Karakas, Arudha Padas, Swamsha, Karakamsha, Argala, and Chara Dasha timing
commands.hint: [optional notes — life domain or timing question]

commands.description: Rin (debt) diagnosis, pakka ghar, sleeping planets, teva, varshphal, and ranked upaay with Farman citations
commands.hint: [reading type — natal | rin | family | varshphal | upaay]

commands.description: Life reading and event-timing prediction via cuspal sub-lords, significators, Sookshma dasha, and Ruling Planets
Yes/no and timing answers from a 1–249 number plus the moment and place of the question
